title: cyperus sesquiflorus var. minor
intro: Cyperus sesquiflorus var. minor, also known as minor umbrella sedge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of this plant include treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its use in treating water retention and urinary problems. The herbal preparations of Cyperus sesquiflorus var. minor include tea, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds and apply them topically or ingest them for therapeutic purposes.
